name: DivX

version_check.note: No active version checking for Mac — product is discontinued

download.url_note: Serves the last-ever Mac build only

release_date.note: No new Mac releases are being published

min_os_note: Mojave or earlier (last support for 32-bit apps)
notes: DISCONTINUED for Mac. The DivX Player for Mac was a 32-bit application never updated to 64-bit, making it incompatible with macOS Catalina (10.15) and all later versions. Website shows 'DivX 11 for Mac is coming soon!' but no update has materialized. For playing DivX-encoded files on modern Macs, use VLC Media Player, IINA, or Elmedia Player instead.
